scenario: technical warm-up and transport sanity check
objective: confirm that AP state, serial capture, and block-event logging are stable before the baseline blocks
instructions: Stay outside the controlled path between AP and ESP32 capture node.;;Do not move the chair, AP node, table, capture node, or cables.;;If AP state or serial output looks unstable, stop before E1.

objective: capture the first empty reference under the fixed geometry
instructions: Leave the controlled 2.00 m path between AP and capture node.;;If possible, leave the room or stand far enough to avoid affecting the radio path.;;Keep the room layout unchanged.

scenario: one person standing almost still in the controlled path
instructions: Enter the midpoint of the controlled path between AP and capture node.;;Stand almost still with a natural posture.;;Do not touch the chair, AP node, table, or cables.

scenario: one person moving slowly inside the controlled path
instructions: Stay within the same controlled path between AP and capture node.;;Move slowly back and forth without leaving the corridor.;;Do not change the topology of the stand.

scenario: empty scene, recovery after the first motion cycle
objective: check the reverse transition back to empty after the first cycle
instructions: Leave the controlled path again.;;If possible, leave the room or stand far enough to avoid affecting the radio path.;;Keep the room layout unchanged.

scenario: repeated static presence in the same controlled path
objective: capture an in-session repeat for the static-presence state
instructions: Return to the midpoint of the controlled path.;;Stand almost still in approximately the same position as in S1.;;Avoid extra motion not needed for the block.

scenario: repeated slow motion in the same controlled path
objective: capture an in-session repeat for the slow-motion state
instructions: Stay within the same controlled path used in M1.;;Repeat the same slow motion pattern as closely as practical.;;Do not move chairs, table, AP node, capture node, or cables.

objective: finish the session with a final empty reference for block-aware comparison
instructions: Leave the controlled path one final time.;;If possible, leave the room or stand far enough to avoid affecting the radio path.;;Keep the room layout unchanged until the capture is stopped.
